id.description: Unique ID of the paystub object.

account.description: ID of the account associated with the paystub.

payroll_document.description: ID of the [payroll document object](/api-reference/payroll-documents#object) associated with this paystub.

deduction_list.description: An itemized list of deductions listed on the paystub. Each object corresponds to one line item.

filing_status.description: Information on the user's filing status.

tax_list.description: An itemized list of tax withholdings listed on the paystub. Each object corresponds to one line item.

status.description:
Payment status of the paystub.
- `completed` — Payment has been made to the user.
- `scheduled` — Payment is scheduled to be made to the user.
- `cancelled` — Payment was cancelled, and was not nor will be paid to the user.
- `excluded` — Tag used for dummy/sample/watermarked/test paystubs present in the account. These paystubs are excluded when generating reports and other calculations and should not be considered proof of income.

paystub_date.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) of the payment date, sourced from the paystub.

start_date.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) of the start of the work period.

end_date.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) of the end of the work period.

paystub_period.description: Start date and end date of the work period.

gross_pay.description: Total gross pay from the paystub period before taxes or deductions.

deductions.description: Total amount of deductions from the paystub period.

taxes.description: Total tax amount from the paystub period.

net_pay.description: Net pay (gross pay minus taxes and deductions) from the paystub period.

reimbursements.description: Total reimbursement amount from the paystub period.

hours.description: Total hours worked during the paystub period.

fees.description: Total fees incurred during the paystub period.

net_pay_ytd.description: Net pay year-to-date, including this paystub.

gross_pay_ytd.description: Gross pay year-to-date, including this paystub.

employment.description: [Employment](/api-reference/employments) ID. Can be used as a filter when [listing paystubs](/api-reference/paystubs/list-all-paystubs).

city.description: Name of the city, town, district, or similar regional entity.

line1.description: Address-Line 1, usually street address or P.O. Box information.

line2.description: Address-Line 2, usually the apartment or unit number.

state.description: State, county, province, region, or equivalent.

employer_address.description: Object containing employer address information, sourced from the paystub.

created_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the paystub object was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when a property value of the paystub object most recently changed.

destinations.description: Contains information on where and how pay was delivered to the user.

hours_ytd.description: Total hours worked year-to-date, including this paystub's work period.

deductions_ytd.description: Total deductions year-to-date, including amounts from this paystub.

taxes_ytd.description: Total taxes year-to-date, including amounts from this paystub.

gross_pay_list.description: An itemized list of gross pay listed on the paystub. Each object corresponds to one line item.

gross_pay_list_totals.description:
Sums the values of `gross_pay_list` objects based on their `type`:
* **base** = base + pto
* **overtime** = overtime
* **commission** = commission
* **bonus** = bonus
* **other** = disability + benefits + tips + stock + other
